channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in Australia
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in Australia — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Heartstopper Forever — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 6.6 · Worth a watch — It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.

item.title: Desire — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · ★ 6.9 · Worth a watch — Lucero’s life appears immaculate: a wealthy household, a devoted husband, and two children who embody the promise of a perfect family.

item.title: Lucky — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 6.3 · Decent one-time watch — When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must…

item.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.6 · Must watch — Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a…

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.7 · Must watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: THE GHOST IN THE SHELL — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Japanese · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — 2029, a near-future Japan. The full cyborg Motoko Kusanagi envisions a task force that preemptively strikes emerging threats.

item.title: Cape Fear — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 7.1 · Worth a watch — When convicted murderer Max Cady is released from prison, he begins infiltrating the family of the married attorneys who helped put him behind bars.

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.8 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Enola Holmes 3 — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

item.title: The Invite — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.8 · Must watch — Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

item.title: House of the Dragon — Foxtel Now
item.description: Foxtel Now · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Animal Farm — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.5 · Decent one-time watch — A group of farm animals rise up against their neglectful owner, dreaming of equality and freedom.

item.title: Good Boy — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — Tommy, a volatile 19-year-old, revels in drugs, parties and violence. After getting separated from his friends on a drunken bender, he is abducted by a shadowy…
